instructions: This file is the default switch for the EIA weekly latest overlay.
Keep latest_source as xls while EIA is still publishing the legacy WPSR table workbooks.
When EIA actually moves to the new WPSR CSV system, replace this file or edit latest_source to csv.
The weekly cleanup step deletes files inside eia_weekly/, so this config intentionally lives in config/.

notes: These are the active balance and supply XLS tables currently linked from the WPSR page.
Do not include discontinued secure links such as psw10.xls or psw13.xls unless EIA makes them publicly available again.
If EIA changes only the workbook file names, update this table list and leave latest_source as xls.
Leave url blank to use test_url before production_start and prod_url on or after production_start.
When EIA confirms the new CSV is live, set latest_source to csv.
If EIA publishes a different CSV URL, set url to the exact final URL and leave test_url/prod_url as history.
